pagelet.mascot.error: Something went wrong. Try again or send feedback.
pagelet.trigger.alreadyRunning: Pagelet is already reviewing selected notes.
pagelet.trigger.noActiveNote: Open a Markdown note before running Pagelet.
pagelet.trigger.emptyNote: Pagelet needs some note text to review.
pagelet.trigger.noSuggestions: Pagelet finished, but did not find suggestions worth saving.
pagelet.trigger.writeFailed: Pagelet could not save the review note.
pagelet.settings.section.title: Pagelet
pagelet.settings.section.subtitle: Your note's quiet reviewer.
pagelet.settings.beta.callout: Pagelet is in Beta. Suggestions may be imperfect — your feedback helps us improve.
pagelet.settings.general.heading: General
pagelet.settings.model.heading: Model
pagelet.settings.limits.heading: Limits
pagelet.settings.advanced.heading: Advanced
pagelet.settings.enabled.name: Enable Pagelet
pagelet.settings.enabled.desc: Turn the Pagelet reviewer on. When off, the mascot is hidden and review actions are unavailable.
pagelet.settings.reviewsFolder.name: Reviews folder
pagelet.settings.reviewsFolder.desc: Vault path where review notes are stored. Defaults to .pagelet (a dotfolder so other plugins skip it).
pagelet.settings.reviewsFolder.error.emp: Reviews folder cannot be empty. Reverted to the previously valid value.
pagelet.settings.reviewsFolder.error.too: Reviews folder path is too long (max 4096 characters). Reverted to the previously valid value.
pagelet.settings.reviewsFolder.error.abs: Reviews folder must be a vault-relative path (no leading /). Reverted to the previously valid value.
pagelet.settings.reviewsFolder.error.dri: Reviews folder cannot start with a drive letter. Reverted to the previously valid value.
pagelet.settings.reviewsFolder.error.par: Reviews folder cannot contain '..' segments. Reverted to the previously valid value.
pagelet.settings.reviewsFolder.error.obs: Reviews folder cannot live inside .obsidian (Obsidian's config directory). Reverted to the previously valid value.
pagelet.settings.reviewsFolder.error.for: Reviews folder cannot live inside a system dotfolder (.git, .trash, .obsidian.bak). Reverted to the previously valid value.
pagelet.settings.reviewsFolder.error.con: Reviews folder contains control characters. Reverted to the previously valid value.
pagelet.settings.reviewsFolder.error.inv: Reviews folder contains invisible format characters (e.g. zero-width spaces). Reverted to the previously valid value.
pagelet.settings.reviewsFolder.error.tra: Reviews folder segments cannot end in '.' or whitespace (Windows strips them silently). Reverted to the previously valid value.
pagelet.migration.reviewsFolderCoerced.t: Pagelet: your saved reviews folder was reset to the default because it failed the new validator. Old review files (if any) were left on disk at:
pagelet.settings.outputLanguage.name: Output language
pagelet.settings.outputLanguage.desc: Language used for review suggestions. Auto follows the note's language; pick a value to force one.
pagelet.settings.temperature.name: Temperature
pagelet.settings.temperature.desc: Model creativity. Lower values produce more deterministic reviews. Range 0.0 to 0.5; default 0.2.
pagelet.settings.maxInputTokens.name: Max input tokens
pagelet.settings.maxInputTokens.desc: Per-review input cap. Default 8000; max 32000. Longer notes are split or refused.
pagelet.settings.maxOutputTokens.name: Max output tokens
pagelet.settings.pet.heading: Pet
pagelet.settings.petVisible.name: Show Pet
pagelet.settings.petVisible.desc: Show the floating Pet mascot in the workspace.
pagelet.settings.petCorner.name: Pet corner
pagelet.settings.petCorner.desc: Which corner of the workspace the Pet floats in.
pagelet.settings.proactiveHints.name: Proactive hints
pagelet.settings.proactiveHints.desc: Let Pet proactively surface hints based on your activity.
Minimum minutes between proactive hints. Range 1–120; default 30.
pagelet.settings.preload.heading: Background Review Preparation
pagelet.settings.preloadEnabled.name: Prepare reviews in the background
pagelet.settings.preloadEnabled.desc: Quietly prepares review context in the background so Pagelet can respond faster. Note text may be sent to your configured AI provider and may use credits.
pagelet.settings.preloadInterval.name: Preparation interval (minutes)
pagelet.settings.preloadInterval.desc: Minutes between background preparation cycles. Range 5–240; default 30.
pagelet.settings.preloadPerHourCap.name: Per-hour preparation cap
pagelet.settings.preloadPerHourCap.desc: Maximum background preparation cycles per hour. Range 1–20; default 2.
pagelet.settings.preloadPerDayCap.name: Per-day preparation cap
pagelet.settings.preloadPerDayCap.desc: Maximum background preparation cycles per day. Range 1–200; default 20.
pagelet.settings.preloadTokenBudgetInput: Maximum input tokens per background preparation call. Range 1000–8000; default 4000.
pagelet.settings.preloadTokenBudgetOutpu: Maximum output tokens per background preparation call. Range 500–2000; default 1000.
pagelet.settings.reviews.heading: Reviews
pagelet.settings.periodicSummaryScope.de: Time window for periodic review summaries.
pagelet.settings.excludedFolders.name: Excluded folders
pagelet.settings.excludedFolders.desc: Comma-separated folder paths to exclude from review and background preparation (e.g. private, drafts).
pagelet.settings.excludedTags.name: Excluded tags
pagelet.settings.excludedPatterns.name: Excluded patterns
pagelet.settings.excludedPatterns.desc: Comma-separated path substrings to exclude (e.g. draft, wip).
pagelet.settings.quietHours.heading: Quiet Hours
pagelet.settings.quietHoursEnabled.name: Enable quiet hours
pagelet.settings.quietHoursEnabled.desc: Suppress proactive hints during a specified time window.
pagelet.settings.quietHoursStart.name: Start time
pagelet.settings.quietHoursEnd.name: End time
pagelet.settings.foreground.heading: Foreground Cost
pagelet.settings.foregroundPerHourCap.de: Maximum foreground review calls per hour. Range 1–60; default 10.
pagelet.settings.foregroundPerDayCap.des: Maximum foreground review calls per day. Range 1–500; default 100.
pagelet.errors.schema_invalid: Pagelet review failed: the model's response did not match the expected structure. Please try again or send feedback.
pagelet.errors.parse_failed: Pagelet review failed: the model's response could not be parsed. Please try again or send feedback.
pagelet.errors.timeout: Pagelet review timed out. Try again, or shorten the note before retrying.
pagelet.errors.provider_error: Pagelet review failed: the AI provider returned an error. Check your API key, provider, and model in settings.
pagelet.errors.input_too_large: Pagelet refused this review because the note exceeds the configured input token limit. Try shortening or splitting the note.
pagelet.errors.hard_cap_exceeded: Pagelet refused this review because input plus reserved output exceeds the hard token cap. Lower max input or max output tokens in settings.
pagelet.errors.rate_limit_hourly: Pagelet hit the hourly call limit. Try again later.
pagelet.errors.rate_limit_daily: Pagelet hit the daily call limit. It will resume tomorrow.
pagelet.cost.label: Cost
pagelet.cost.limitReached: Pagelet hit the daily call limit. It will resume tomorrow.
pagelet.panel.title: Pagelet
pagelet.panel.empty: Run Pagelet to review the selected notes.
pagelet.panel.scope.title: Scope
pagelet.panel.action.reviewSelectedDescr: Review {count} selected notes. Selected note text may be sent to your configured AI provider and may use credits.
pagelet.panel.summary.fallback: Pagelet found suggestions for this note.
pagelet.panel.status.researchBlocked: Chat already has text; prompt not replaced
pagelet.panel.reviewQueue.title: Review Queue
pagelet.discover.vssNotReady.title: Enable Memory to Discover Connections
pagelet.discover.vssNotReady.desc: Semantic connection discovery requires Memory to be prepared. Go to Settings > Memory to enable and prepare it.
pagelet.discover.noResults.title: No Connections Found
pagelet.discover.noResults.desc: No semantically related notes were found for this note. Try again after adding more notes or updating Memory.
pagelet.panel.draft.title: Draft
pagelet.panel.draft.empty: Add suggestions to collect a draft.
pagelet.a11y.announce.done: Pagelet finished reviewing. Suggestions are ready.
pagelet.a11y.announce.error: Pagelet review failed. Open the panel for details.
pagelet.research.prompt.search: Use web search if available before answering.
pagelet.research.prompt.task: Research this Pagelet suggestion. Do not modify any notes.
pagelet.research.prompt.output: Return concise external evidence, useful links, and any uncertainty.
pagelet.preview.panel.label: Save review note
pagelet.preview.panel.title: Save review note
pagelet.preview.panel.description: Create one Markdown review note. Source notes are not modified.
pagelet.backgroundPreparation.startupNot: Pagelet background review preparation is on. Note text may be sent to your configured AI provider and may use credits. You can turn it off in Settings.
pagelet.bubble.onboarding: Click the Pet to see findings, expand Panel for deeper analysis.
pagelet.onboarding.maintenanceScan: PA can scan your vault and suggest how to organize notes. Try it from the command palette.
pagelet.onboarding.quickCapture: Your thought is saved. PA will remind you when it becomes relevant to what you're writing.
pagelet.onboarding.quietRecall: PA found a note you wrote before that may be relevant now. Click to see why.
pagelet.bubble.periodicSummaryDescriptio: Use AI to summarize recent changes
pagelet.bubble.quietRecall.current: A saved insight may fit the note you are viewing.
pagelet.bubble.quietRecall.related: A saved insight may connect to nearby notes.
pagelet.bubble.quietRecall.far: An older saved insight may be worth revisiting.
pagelet.bubble.quietRecall.linkDescripti: Link this note and the recalled note
pagelet.bubble.patterns.openDescription: Open the pattern list in Pagelet
pagelet.notice.noNotesInRange: No notes found in the selected time range.
pagelet.notice.alreadyReviewing: Pagelet is already reviewing. Please wait for it to finish.
pagelet.notice.foregroundLimit: Pagelet hit the foreground review limit. Try again later.
pagelet.research.status.openChat: Open the Chat panel to research this finding
pagelet.preload.status.title: Background Preparation Status
pagelet.preload.status.noCachedFindings: No background suggestions are available yet.
pagelet.tab.title: Pagelet — Detail View
pagelet.tab.overview.summary: {count} findings found. Here are the key takeaways:
pagelet.tab.empty.title: No findings yet
pagelet.tab.empty.body: Detail results are temporary. Run Pagelet from the panel, then expand the results here.
pagelet.tab.restored.title: Result no longer available
pagelet.tab.restored.body: Pagelet detail results are temporary. Re-run Pagelet or open a saved review or summary note from your vault history.
pagelet.tab.reviewQueue.title: Kept Items & Actions
pagelet.tab.reviewQueue.summary: {count} kept or action-ready items are available.
pagelet.tab.savedInsights.title: Saved Insights
pagelet.tab.savedInsights.summary: {count} saved insights are available for recall.
pagelet.tab.savedInsights.type.question: Question
pagelet.tab.memory.title: Memory
pagelet.tab.memory.summary: {count} memory records are available for review.
pagelet.tab.memory.candidatesSummary: You may want to review {count} memory suggestions.
pagelet.tab.memory.forgottenMarker: Forgotten memory marker. The original memory text is no longer stored.
pagelet.tab.memory.confirmAllPrompt: Confirm {count} visible Memory suggestions? PA may use them when helping you later. Your notes will not be changed.
pagelet.tab.maintenance.title: Maintenance Review
pagelet.tab.maintenance.noProposals: No cleanup suggestions right now. Your notes look well-organized.
pagelet.tab.maintenance.actionUnavailabl: This suggestion is preview only for now.
pagelet.maintenance.apply.unsupported: Only move suggestions can be applied in this version.
pagelet.maintenance.apply.confirmMessage: Move {oldPath} to {newPath}. Source note text will not be changed.
pagelet.tab.recall.title: Quiet Recall
pagelet.tab.recall.empty: No strong recall signal right now.
pagelet.tab.recall.linkBlocked: This link is outside the current data boundary.
pagelet.tab.recall.linkNoActiveNote: Open a Markdown note before linking.
pagelet.tab.recall.linkNoCandidate: This recall has no linkable source note.
pagelet.tab.graphDiscovery.title: Graph Suggestions
pagelet.tab.graphDiscovery.summary: {count} source-backed suggestions found. {skipped} source(s) skipped by current boundaries.
pagelet.tab.patterns.title: Cross-note patterns
pagelet.tab.patterns.empty: No patterns left in this view.
pagelet.graphDiscovery.none: No source-backed graph suggestions found for this scope.
pagelet.tab.scopeRecap.title: Scope Recap
